creator: kabalax@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

%uname -a

FreeBSD SRV-SYNTH01 11.1-RELEASE-p8 FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p8 #0 r330926: Wed Mar 14 15:26:58 CET 2018     r00t@SRV-SYNTH:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/BSD112017110501PHY  amd64

$pkg info | grep softhsm
softhsm-1.3.8                  Software implementation of a Hardware Security Module (HSM)

With softhsm-1.3.8 already installed I'm able to 'pkg install softhsm2' without any issues. 

CONFLICTS= softhsm-1.* doesn't seem to trigger. Perhaps softhsm-1.[0-4]* would do the trick?

Thanks.
